{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173319BD93A80C23D8F3DAE5A4"}"},"total":1198},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7475133817867944766","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了一大半，确实是一本不错的小说，目前完结的这两个副本都设计得非常出彩，配上恐怖bgm食用简直绝佳，氛围感拉满，而且主角挂开的也不大，甚至可以说是没有挂，年龄小既是劣势也是优势吧，唯一让我感觉有点问题的是某些情感转变的处理，略显生硬，让我有点怀疑主角是否有两个人格[捂脸]，不过无cp嘛，这点问题倒是无所谓了，后面成长起来了，作者就只需要专心设计剧本了[奸笑]，嘛，总体来说还是一本值得一看的小说吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740449130,"group_id":"7441088503900818494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyz1iT//g6J8a/DYnltd86CRTukBAW++xovLb5xOoyWn","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a821b928e50145889d1e40184bc182f0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529536&x-signature=YI7KHCitlygvT4KVhRPMUzenGu0%3D","user_id":"1187948518709855","user_name":"半只大圆脸胖鸡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1187948518709855","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1805451762,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16} 一张特殊的卡片，引领身处绝境的人，进入无限惊悚游戏……
活下去，就有机会获得数之不尽的财富，成为人上人。
活不下去，就会成为各种怨灵的养料，在离开游戏后莫名其妙死亡。
你，做好进入游戏的准备了吗？
——
没有准备好也没有关系，你没有选择的余地。
